stress_spike_panel.finding: Weak positive relationship between stress and discretionary spend using `prior_week_stress_raw` alignment (statistically significant).
evidence: Track discretionary categories weekly and compare against stressful calendar periods.

calendar_events.title: Skate session with roommates (2h) - East Austin

spike_weeks.evidence: Week 2024-19 spend $214.50 crossed threshold $34.39; prior week stress was 0.04.

rate_signal_panel.finding: Detected invoices that imply hourly rates below the $65 baseline.
evidence: Used trailing 28-day calendar-based project hours when invoice email had no explicit hours.
